name: Profit Powerhouse — Weekly P&L Summary
description: Every Sunday 8am UTC: fetch last 7 days from Airtable Revenue_Log, aggregate by stream, generate plain-English summary via Groq, send to Gmail + Telegram.

parameters.body: {{toJSON({"model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You write concise, encouraging weekly P&L summaries for a small automated business."}, {"role": "user", "content": concat("Write a brief (3-4 sentences) weekly P&L summary. Revenue data: ", toString(3.result), ". Include what's trending up, any concerns, and one specific recommendation for next week. Keep it factual and motivating.")}], "max_tokens": 250})}}

parameters.subject: Weekly P&L — {{formatDate(now; 'MMMM D, YYYY')}}

_setup_instructions.step2: Connect Airtable module with your API key
_setup_instructions.step3: Connect Gmail module with your Gmail account
_setup_instructions.step4: Connect Telegram Bot module with your token
_setup_instructions.step5: Replace GROQ_API_KEY in the HTTP module
_setup_instructions.step6: Replace YOUR_EMAIL with your email address
_setup_instructions.step7: Enable the scenario — it runs every Sunday at 8am
